memo: JARVIS Step 11 — Read-Only Hardening Audit Memo
audited_commit_subject: Add JARVIS Step 10 read-only system map panel
scope: Read-only audit of the JARVIS command center. No panel added. No code, UI, test, or tool files modified.

pytest.note: Used scoped --rootdir=tests to avoid corrupted hydra dir collection issues. Bare pytest not run.

read_only_posture.endpoint_doc: api_jarvis_status() docstring: every section fail-closed; nothing executes, trades, uploads, or fires automation.
read_only_posture.safe_wrapper: _jarvis_safe(fn) catches all exceptions into an error dict; one failing section never crashes the 200 response.

cached_report_pattern.summary: Three offline tools write storage/jarvis/*.json (gitignored). The web route ONLY reads those files and never runs git, tests, or probes itself.

system_map_consistency.note: Cosmetic documentation naming only — not a safety bug. The system map uses logical panel ids that differ from three raw JSON keys.

route_smoke_safety.method: GET-only probes executed offline by the tool; web reads cached JSON
route_smoke_safety.note: /money-spartan returns 404 — non-required route; flagged but not blocking

commander_snapshot_logic.inputs: operator_safety, safety_gates, health, route_smoke, mission_board, prompt_library, file_hygiene, trading_detail, git
commander_snapshot_logic.reason: Large untracked backlog (4368) and dirty working tree keep it yellow; conservative-by-design, not an error.

ui_execution_control_scan.fetch_detail: single GET to /api/jarvis/status with Accept: application/json; polled on a timer; no write verbs

covers: each cached-report reader: missing / unavailable / ready states
tracked-JSON readers: prompt library, mission board, system map
system map: shape, fail-closed, script paths display-only, no execution fields
commander snapshot derived shape and no forbidden control keys
no forbidden trade-action language on page
app.py block has no broker/execution imports
readers do not spawn subprocess / urllib during status build

risks_warnings: Large untracked backlog (4368 files) keeps commander_snapshot yellow — operator hygiene item, not a safety defect.
/money-spartan route returns 404 in route smoke (non-required) — confirm whether the route was removed or renamed.
System map panel-id vs API-key naming mismatch on 3 entries — documentation polish only.

documentation_status.stale_or_missing: none blocking; minor system-map naming polish recommended

step_12_recommendation: Reconcile the 3 system-map panel-id vs API-key naming differences (e.g. add an explicit api_key field to each system_map panel) and/or add a read-only Audit Consistency panel that surfaces this cross-reference as display-only. Keep strictly read-only — no buttons, forms, POST, or execution.
